div.h2: Need a new direction? Find what you need through Micron.com.

div.class: container responsivegrid background-grey comp-container cmp-container__remove-padding--top same-size-items four-card-layout aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12
teaser cmp-content__tile equal-height top-padding right-padding aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12

div.data-cmp-data-layer: {"contenttile-f89d167268":{"@type":"micron/components/content/contenttile","repo:modifyDate":"2024-09-17T20:18:47Z","dc:title":"Products","dc:description":"Discover Micron Technology's products and technologies, providing leading memory and storage innovation supporting breakthrough customer solutions.","xdm:linkURL":"/products"}}

div.p: Micron products and technologies help solve some of the world’s biggest challenges and enable never-before-imagined use cases and experiences. With leadership in core node and process technology, advanced manufacturing and operational excellence, Micron provides leading memory and storage innovation to enable breakthrough customer solutions.

div.class: teaser cmp-content__tile equal-height top-padding right-padding left-padding aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12

div.data-cmp-data-layer: {"contenttile-70b0be1a78":{"@type":"micron/components/content/contenttile","repo:modifyDate":"2024-09-17T20:18:47Z","dc:title":"Markets & Industries","dc:description":"Micron's memory and storage solutions drive insight and development in data centers, automotive, mobile, and more markets.","xdm:linkURL":"/markets-industries"}}

div.p: Micron’s world-leading technology has been foundational to innovations that continue to transform the world in countless ways. From devices to edge and cloud, memory and storage solutions are integral to delivering greater insight, new experiences and accelerated opportunity.

img.alt: Lights and grids dissappearing to a vanishing point on the horizon

div.class: teaser cmp-content__tile equal-height top-padding right-padding left-padding aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12

div.data-cmp-data-layer: {"contenttile-dc56eb187b":{"@type":"micron/components/content/contenttile","repo:modifyDate":"2024-09-17T20:18:47Z","dc:title":"Partners","dc:description":"Explore Micron's partnerships with industry leaders, tech innovators, and research institutions, highlighting commitment to excellence and advancement.","xdm:linkURL":"/partners"}}

div.p: Through partner programs, we're building ecosystems to co-develop better solutions for our customers. Discover some of MIcron's partners and programs.

img.alt: AI generated city street at night

div.class: teaser cmp-content__tile equal-height top-padding left-padding aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12

div.data-cmp-data-layer: {"contenttile-a83262c1b7":{"@type":"micron/components/content/contenttile","repo:modifyDate":"2024-09-17T20:18:47Z","dc:title":"About ","dc:description":"Micron offers equal employment opportunities regardless of race, color, religion, gender, age, disability, veteran status, or other protected class.","xdm:linkURL":"/about"}}

div.p: We are a world leader in innovative memory solutions that transform how the world uses information. For over 45 years, our company has been instrumental to the world’s most significant technology advancements, delivering optimal memory and storage systems for a broad range of applications.

img.alt: Clearn room employees walking down the hallway of a fabrication plant

div.class: featuredcontent teaser content-and-image image-right background-white ul-2-column aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12

div.data-cmp-data-layer: {"featuredcontent-e24dcde8da":{"@type":"micron/components/content/featuredcontent","repo:modifyDate":"2026-02-04T14:57:58Z","dc:title":"Design tools","dc:description":"Explore Micron's design tools for streamlined integration and optimization of memory and storage solutions tailored to your specific requirements."}}

div.p: Your single source for tools and resources needed to maximize Micron's products and solutions for your design needs.
